display.purpose: App title and rare page-level identity moments.

headline.purpose: Panel headings and page section titles.

title.purpose: Card titles, group headers, and compact content headings.

body.purpose: Main descriptive copy and update summaries.

label.purpose: Buttons, field labels, status labels, and compact controls.

mono.purpose: Source identifiers, prompt cards, and technical diagnostics.

shadows.name: keyline-rest
shadows.purpose: Tiny anchored depth for brand marks and small floating details.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Accessible focus emphasis for fields and controls.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default hover, border, background, and color state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button for refresh, save, and creation flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 40px; border: 1px solid var(--accent, #165a2b); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--accent, #165a2b); color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 14px; font: 600 14px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: transform 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover, #0f4d27); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(22, 90, 43, 0.16); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button that keeps hierarchy quiet.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 40px; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #cfdacf); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface, #ffffff); color: var(--text, #111816); padding: 10px 14px; font: 600 14px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: transform 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--faint, #a1a1aa); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(22, 90, 43, 0.1); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard form field for interests, sources, and filters.
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: var(--text-soft, #3f4f49); font: 500 13px/1.35 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field { width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #cfdacf); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface, #ffffff); color: var(--text, #111816); padding: 11px 12px; font: 400 14px/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-field::placeholder { color: var(--faint, #a1a1aa); } .ds-field:focus { border-color: rgba(22, 90, 43, 0.65); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(22, 90, 43, 0.1); }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Sticky product navigation with quiet active states.
components.css: .ds-topnav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #dfe7df); background: var(--background, #f8faf8); padding: 0 0 18px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-brand { color: var(--text, #111816); font-weight: 600; } .ds-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; } .ds-links button { border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--muted, #66736e); padding: 0; font: 500 13px/1.35 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-links button:hover, .ds-links .ds-nav-active { color: var(--text, #111816); } .ds-links .ds-nav-active { font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Primary shell container for form and content workspaces.
components.html:
Interests

Tracked topics

Organize sources around the updates you want to follow.
components.css: .ds-panel { display: grid; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dfe7df); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface, #ffffff); color: var(--text, #111816); padding: 18px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.25; font-weight: 500; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted, #66736e); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-section-label { color: var(--accent, #165a2b) !important; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px !important; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact metadata chip for priority and source attributes.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 26px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dfe7df); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-muted, #f3f6f3); color: var(--text-soft, #3f4f49); padding: 4px 8px; font: 600 12px/1.35 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Update Card
components.description: Scannable update row with source image, metadata, and collection actions.
components.html:
TS
TypeScript 6.0 beta announced

Compiler updates and language service changes worth reviewing.

TypeScript blogfeed
components.css: .ds-update-card { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 76px minmax(0, 1fr) auto; gap: 14px; align-items: start; min-height: 92px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dfe7df); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface-muted, #f3f6f3); padding: 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-avatar { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 76px; height: 76px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dfe7df); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--accent-soft, #eaf3ec); color: var(--accent, #165a2b); font-weight: 800; } .ds-update-content { display: grid; gap: 10px; min-width: 0; } .ds-update-content a { color: var(--text, #111816); font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; overflow-wrap: anywhere; } .ds-update-content p { margin: 0; color: var(--text, #111816); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; color: var(--muted, #66736e); font-size: 12px; } .ds-icon-btn { width: 38px; height: 38px; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #cfdacf); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface, #ffffff); color: var(--text-soft, #3f4f49); font: 700 18px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { border-color: var(--faint, #a1a1aa); color: var(--text, #111816); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Status Callout
components.description: Compact state block for loading, empty, warning, and error states.
components.html: No saved updatesSave updates from the Updates page to collect them here.
components.css: .ds-callout { display: grid; gap: 4px; border: 1px dashed var(--border, #dfe7df); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface-muted, #f3f6f3); padding: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-callout strong { color: var(--text, #111816); font-size: 13px; } .ds-callout span { color: var(--muted, #66736e); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.45; }

components.name: Toast
components.css: .ds-toast { display: inline-flex; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; background: #18181b; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 16px; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.18); font: 600 13px/1.35 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview:
Signal Garden is a precise workbench for turning noisy source streams into usable updates. The interface should feel calm, technical, and daily-use ready: a place where technical users can define interests, inspect fresh updates, save useful items, and leave clean structure behind for AI agents.

The visual system is restrained by design. Light garden-tinted neutrals carry most of the surface area, deep green marks primary action and active state, and amber appears only as a small signal accent. The system rejects marketing-page theatrics, decorative garden theming, social-feed engagement patterns, and dashboard chrome that competes with update content.

Components are precise and quiet: compact type, 8px control radii, visible borders, stable spacing, and clear status treatments. Depth exists, but only as layered restraint: borders, tonal surfaces, and focus rings do the work; shadows are reserved for transient feedback.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained product shell with one primary green accent.
Dense but readable information hierarchy for interests, sources, updates, and collections.
Borders, tonal surfaces, and focus rings first; shadows only where depth clarifies transient feedback.
Human-readable states for loading, empty, saved, offline, warning, and error moments.
Explicit source and interest language that works for both humans and AI agents.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Garden green is the single primary action voice. Do not introduce another saturated action color for routine commands.

rules.name: The Amber Is A Pin Rule
rules.body: Amber marks a signal point or important status. It must never become a broad warning palette or decorative wash.

rules.name: The Surface First Rule
rules.body: Most contrast should come from text, borders, and tonal surfaces. Large color fields are reserved for future onboarding or explicit brand moments, not daily app screens.

rules.name: The Product Type Rule
rules.body: One sans family carries the interface. Do not add display fonts, tightened letter spacing, or dramatic type contrast for ordinary app UI.

rules.name: The Source Precision Rule
rules.body: Use mono only where the content is technical or identifier-like. Mono is for source clarity, not decoration.

rules.name: The Border-Led Shell Rule
rules.body: The app shell is defined by keylines, spacing, and tonal surfaces. Do not pair 1px borders with broad decorative shadows on panels, cards, or buttons.

rules.name: The No Decorative Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur is not part of the core component language. Use opaque or near-opaque surfaces for panels and navigation unless a specific overlay needs it.

dos: Do preserve the product register: restrained, task-first, and familiar to technical users.
Do use Garden Action for primary actions, selected states, focus moments, and source affordances.
Do keep component radii near 8px and use 999px only for badges, chips, and dots.
Do expose loading, empty, saved, offline, warning, and error states with clear recovery text.
Do keep source and interest concepts visually explicit so humans and AI agents can understand the same structure.
Do use borders, tonal backgrounds, and focus rings before reaching for shadows.
donts: Don't make the app feel like a marketing landing page, a social feed optimized for engagement, or a decorative garden-themed interface.
Don't use large green gradients, leaf-pattern backgrounds, playful botanical illustrations, nested cards, or dashboard chrome that competes with the updates themselves.
Don't hide failures behind quiet fallbacks. Collection, source, and agent-integration failures need clear states and recovery paths.
Don't introduce decorative glassmorphism, gradient text, oversized rounded cards, or colored side-stripe borders.
Don't add new saturated accent colors for routine UI states. The palette is restrained on purpose.
Don't use display fonts, tightened heading letter spacing, or editorial typography inside product controls and data rows.
